positive: Minimalist black and white line art illustration of a whimsical forest scene. The main subject is a group of stylized, interconnected fauna (e.g., owl, fox, deer) gathered around glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate ferns. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, suitable for a T-shirt print. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and graphic contrast. Use intricate line work reminiscent of Scandinavian folk art, executed with high detail and negative space. Overhead, softly diffused lighting accentuating texture and shadow. Style: Nordic graphic print, detailed stencil art, clean vector aesthetics. Aspect ratio 1:1.
